summary: Verified 5 critical accounting bug fixes in Arkiflo CRM. All fixes are working correctly: (1) Liability creation creates double-entry accounting transactions, (2) Journal Entry transactions have both 'date' and 'transaction_date' fields, (3) Trial Balance uses transaction_date for filtering with $or fallback, (4) Quarter calculation uses Indian FY format (Q4 FY 2025-26 for Jan-Mar), (5) Daily Closing Snapshot returns correct opening balance for historical dates.
passed_tests: FIX 1: Liability creation endpoint works (201 status)
FIX 2: Journal Entry created with transaction_date field (JE-202603-0006)
FIX 3: Trial Balance uses transaction_date filtering (calculation_method: direct_aggregation_from_transactions)
FIX 3: Trial Balance works for all periods (month, quarter, fy)
FIX 4: Quarter shows Indian FY format - 'Q4 FY 2025-26' for March 2026
FIX 4: Quarter date range correct (2026-01-01 to 2026-03-31 for Q4)
FIX 5: Daily Closing works for today
FIX 5: Daily Closing returns different data for historical dates
critical_code_review_comments: FIX 1: create_liability function (line 29299) now creates double-entry transactions with reference_type='liability_creation'
FIX 2: create_journal_entry function (line 30661) now sets both 'date' and 'transaction_date' fields on transactions
FIX 3: get_trial_balance function (line 29935) uses $or filter for transaction_date with fallback to created_at for legacy data
FIX 4: Quarter calculation (line 29978) correctly uses Indian FY (Q1=Apr-Jun, Q2=Jul-Sep, Q3=Oct-Dec, Q4=Jan-Mar)
FIX 5: get_daily_closing_snapshot function (line 30204) calculates opening balance from pre-period transactions
seed_data_creation: Created test liability (lia_9bddc025) and journal entry (JE-202603-0006) for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 accounting fixes verified: (1) Liability double-entry, (2) JE transaction_date, (3) Trial Balance transaction_date filter, (4) Indian FY quarter format, (5) Daily Closing opening balance. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_accounting_fixes.py covers all fixes.

fix_1_liability_accounting_entries.description: Liability creation now creates double-entry accounting transactions

fix_2_journal_entry_date_field.description: Journal Entry transactions have both 'date' and 'transaction_date' fields

fix_3_trial_balance_transaction_date.description: Trial Balance uses transaction_date for filtering with $or fallback to created_at

fix_4_indian_fy_quarter.description: Quarter calculation uses Indian FY (Q1=Apr-Jun, Q4=Jan-Mar)

fix_5_daily_closing_opening_balance.description: Daily Closing Snapshot returns correct opening balance for historical dates
